projects.name: Realtime Ops Monitor
projects.description: A low-latency observability dashboard for distributed services with smart anomaly hints.
projects.problem: Teams lacked a simple way to identify service regressions quickly.
projects.impact: Reduced average triage time by 41% in internal tests.

projects.name: PromptForge Studio
projects.description: A project workspace for prompt testing, versioning, and A/B output comparison.
projects.problem: Prompt iteration was inconsistent across teams.
projects.impact: Improved output consistency and reduced manual retries.

projects.name: Edge Notes API
projects.description: A stateless notes backend optimized for global reads and lightweight auth.
projects.problem: Needed globally fast note retrieval without heavyweight infra.
projects.impact: Consistent sub-100ms reads across test regions.
